30871854.title: Desmond Connell

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Irish cardinal in the Roman Catholic Church

30871854.description: Irish cardinal in the Roman Catholic Church
30871854.extract: Desmond Connell  (24 March 1926 – 21 February 2017) was an Irish cardinal in the Roman Catholic Church. He was an Archbishop of Dublin and Primate of Ireland. Cardinal Connell was one of a number of senior clergy to have been heavily criticised for inaction, making misleading statements and covering up clerical sex abuse in Dublin. He died on 21 February 2017, aged 90.
